response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud technologies, aligning with the job requirements. Their diverse background and technical skills are strengths.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Diverse technical background with multiple programming languages
concerns: Lack of direct mention of experience with vector databases or RAG architectures
No explicit mention of LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques
Limited cloud platform experience mentioned, mainly inferred from AWS CDK

key_factors.factor: Limited direct experience with GenAI technologies
